title: Automations For Late and Due Tasks
excerpt: Is there an automation that can pull all of the Late and Due items and sub items if someone is on multiple boards? Thank you!

posts.author: Chenry (Candra Henry)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there an automation that can pull all of the Late and Due items and sub items if someone is on multiple boards? Thank you!

posts.author: kaylak (Kayla K)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Chenry,

Have you looked into the “My Work” view for this? It creates groups for over due items, due today, due this week, etc. and pulls from all boards that a person is assigned to.

Here is the documentation on the My Work view from Monday.

Support

My Work

4 min read Feature     My work is a great way to see everything you and your team need to accomplish in a convenient, easy-to-use space. It works by showcasing all tasks across your monday.c...

posts.author: Chenry (Candra Henry)
posts.cookedHtml: Im trying to create a report to be emailed to the person and management that has due or late task. I have part of the automation now but its not pulling from all the boards the employee is on.
